---
id: put-v-1-employees-employee-id-i-9-authorization-employer-sign
title: "Employer sign an employee's Form I-9"
description: "Sign an employee's Form I-9 as an employer. Once the form is signed, the employee's I-9 authorization is considered complete and cannot be modified."
sidebar_label: "Employer sign an employee's Form I-9"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: docs/api/gusto-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Employer sign an employee's Form I-9"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v1/employees/{employee_id}/i9_authorization/employer_sign"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sign an employee's Form I-9 as an employer. Once the form is signed, the employee's I-9 authorization is considered complete and cannot be modified.

scope: `i9_authorizations:manage`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
